results.title: Why Government Bonds Are Considered Safe Investments
results.description: When I first started managing my own money, I spent way too much time obsessing over risky stocks, hoping for a quick win. I quickly learned the hard way that chasing those "big gains" often led to sleepless nights and a rollercoaster of stress. Over time, I realized that true financial success isn't just about how much you can make, but how well you can protect what you’ve already saved. For me, the bond market has become the perfect anchor, providing the kind of steady, reliable growth that...

results.title: AIPI Pays $13.50 Annually But Lags the AI Trade By 9 Percentage Points
results.description: REX's AI options fund is throwing off eye-popping cash distributions every week now, but two analysts are raising serious questions about where that money is actually coming from and whether chasing the yield means quietly giving up on the AI rally itself.
